title: Monkfish with Crispy Australian Toast
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring monkfish paired with crispy toast.
instructions: 2. Season the monkfish fillets with salt and black pepper.
3. In a pan over medium-high heat, melt 1 tbsp of buttery. Add the monkfish fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
4. Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, slice the Australian bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until crispy.
6. In a small pan over low heat, melt the remaining 1 tbsp of buttery.
7. Serve the monkfish on top of the crispy toast, spooning the melted butter over the top.
